CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-29-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAY-12-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, VERONICA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA LA MUNECA DRESS SHOP
DECLARATION OF ANSON LOUIE RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID CODE 1521,1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, VERONICA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA LA MUNECA DRESS SHOP POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AS TO EQUIPMENT ENVOLVED., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,496.80, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $262.08 DAMAGES, $1,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $183.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,820.08, -THE DAMAGES AMOUNT CORRESPOND TO INTEREST.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
